domain_age.note: Domains under 180 days are considered high risk

llm_analysis.summary: Legitimate email from Coursera with proper authentication and no suspicious content
llm_analysis.authentication: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC all pass, indicating the email is authentic and from the claimed domain
llm_analysis.sender: The sender domain m.learn.coursera.org is legitimate and matches the display name Coursera, with no signs of brand impersonation
llm_analysis.threat_intel: The sender IP has a low AbuseIPDB score, and OTX, GreyNoise, and other threat intelligence sources do not report any threats, indicating a low risk
llm_analysis.content: The email body appears to be a legitimate notification from Coursera, with no urgent language, fear tactics, or suspicious links or requests
llm_analysis.conclusion: Based on the analysis, this email is likely a legitimate notification from Coursera, with no indicators of phishing, BEC, or spam
